zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas GROSVENOR於1377年出生在英國英格蘭爾赫爾姆 瓦爾費爾德時，他的父親Robert le Grosvenor36歲，母親Margaret DANYERS27歲。他於1404年與Joan de Venables在英國英格蘭爾米德列維其結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1429年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾馬可特 德雷頓享年52歲。

nameMeanings.name: GROSVENOR
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from French gros ‘big, great’ + veneur ‘hunter’.

History: This is the name of one of the wealthiest families in Britain, which holds the title Duke of Westminster. They have been long established in Cheshire, with strong links with the city of Chester. One of the earliest recorded bearers of the name was Robert le Grosvenor of Budworth, who was granted lands by the Earl of Chester in 1160. The family's fortunes were founded by Thomas Grosvenor (born 1656), who in 1677 married an heiress, Mary Davies, whose inheritance included Ebury Farm, Middlesex. This now forms an area of central London that includes Grosvenor Square and Belgrave Square.

variants.name: Gravenor
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French grand ‘big, tall’ + veneor ‘hunter’. Compare Grosvenor .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas GROSVENOR was born in 1377, in Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert le Grosvenor, was 36 and his mother, Margaret DANYERS, was 27. He married Joan de Venables in 1404, in Middlewich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1429, in Market Drayton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas GROSVENOR est né en 1377, à Hulme Walfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert le Grosvenor, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret DANYERS, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Venables en 1404, à Middlewich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1429, à Market Drayton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas GROSVENORが1377年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアハルメ ワルフィールドで生まれた時，父Robert le Grosvenorは36歳，母Margaret DANYERSは27歳であった。1404年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアミッドルイチでJoan de Venablesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1429年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアマーケト ドレイトンで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas GROSVENOR(이)가 1377년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 훌 월필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert le Grosvenor(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret DANYERS(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 미들루이치에서 Joan de Venables(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 마크트 드라이턴에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas GROSVENOR родился в 1377 г. в местности хулм валфиелд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert le Grosvenor было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret DANYERS, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Venables в 1404 г. в местности миддльвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1429 г. в местности маркет дреитон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.
